text: Love the new dashboard! So much cleaner and easier to navigate.
Finally! The feature I've been waiting for. Great job PurpleMerit team!
New feature works well. The onboarding flow is intuitive.
Just tried @PurpleMerit's new Smart Insights feature - pretty impressive analytics!
The real-time sync is a game changer for my workflow.
Agent helped me set up the new feature quickly. Works great so far!
Best update in months. The UI refresh is clean.
Smart Insights gave me useful recommendations on day one.
Thanks for the new feature! Already saving me 20 mins/day.
The export functionality in Smart Insights is exactly what I needed.
Impressed with how fast @PurpleMerit shipped this. Solid execution.
Good improvement overall. Minor rough edges but solid foundation.
App crashed twice when I tried to open Smart Insights. Very frustrating.
Getting a blank screen when loading the new dashboard. Tried restarting - still broken.
Payment failed 3 times since the update. This is unacceptable.
Constant crashes after latest update. Rolling back to old version if possible.
The app is noticeably slower since the update. Pages take 5+ seconds to load.
My payment didn't go through and I was charged twice. Need immediate help.
Crash crash crash. Every time I open Smart Insights on Android it dies.
I can't complete my checkout. Payment keeps failing since your update.
Latency is terrible. Smart Insights takes forever to load any chart.
@PurpleMerit your new update broke my payment flow. Fix this ASAP!
App crashed and I lost my unsaved work. Absolutely unacceptable.
Third time contacting support about crashes. Still not fixed. Considering cancellation.
Performance degraded significantly. API responses are painfully slow.
Update ruined the app. Crashes on launch, payments broken. 1 star until fixed.
Smart Insights feature is buggy. Data doesn't refresh and sometimes shows errors.
I'm going to cancel my subscription if the crash issues aren't resolved this week.
Smart Insights crashes specifically on Android 13 devices. Reproducible every time.
Payment gateway timeout errors happening multiple times a day now.
New feature is okay. Not sure I understand what Smart Insights does yet.
UI changed. Takes some getting used to. Neither better nor worse.
Noticed the update. Haven't had time to explore the new features yet.
Some things are better, some worse. The old layout was fine for me.
@PurpleMerit updated. Still figuring out the new stuff. Will report back.
Feature works but the color scheme change is jarring. Personal preference I guess.
Just checking - is the Smart Insights feature included in my current plan?
Average update. Nothing groundbreaking but nothing broken for me.
When will the tutorial for Smart Insights be available? Docs seem incomplete.
It's fine. Does what it says. Would like more customization options though.
